news.t: GMO Expands ETF Lineup with New ETFs Focused on Value, International Quality
GMO U.S. Quality ETF (QLTY) Surpasses $1 Billion in Assets Under Management
How GMO's ETF is beating the S&P 500 this year – without Nvidia
Why Goldman Sachs is helping its clients launch ETFs
AI craze stokes ‘bubble within a bubble,' says GMO's Jeremy Grantham
GMO Launches Its First ETF, the Actively Managed GMO U.S. Quality ETF (NYSE: QLTY)

holdings.infoBox: QLTY is an equity ETF with a total of 44 individual holdings. The top holdings are Microsoft stock at 7.17%, Alphabet at 5.64%, Lam Research at 5.38%, Apple at 5.12%, and Broadcom at 4.79%.

overview.description: The GMO US Quality ETF (QLTY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that focuses on equities of high-quality US companies. The funds investments may include companies of any market capitalization. QLTY was launched on Nov 13, 2023 and is issued by GMO.

data.title: GMO Expands ETF Lineup with New ETFs Focused on Value, International Quality
data.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--GMO expands ETF offerings with the launch of GMO International Quality (QLTI), GMO U.S. Value (GMOV), and GMO International Value (GMOI).

data.title: GMO U.S. Quality ETF (QLTY) Surpasses $1 Billion in Assets Under Management
data.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $QLTY--GMO, a global investment manager, today announced that the GMO U.S. Quality ETF (NYSE: QLTY), has surpassed $1 billion in assets under management since launching in ...

data.title: How GMO's ETF is beating the S&P 500 this year – without Nvidia
data.text: GMO's first exchange-traded fund is beating the S&P 500 so far in 2024 — without holding the skyrocketing stock of artificial-intelligence darling Nvidia Corp.

data.title: Why Goldman Sachs is helping its clients launch ETFs
data.text: Firms should offer ETF products because investor demand is not slowing down, according to one Goldman Sachs ETF expert.

data.title: GMO Launches Its First ETF, the Actively Managed GMO U.S. Quality ETF (NYSE: QLTY)
data.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Global investment manager GMO launched its first ETF, the actively-managed GMO U.S. Quality ETF (NYSE: QLTY).
